purpose: Turn repeated candidate/runtime blockers into local setup work so the teacher is reserved for real architecture walls.

local_rom_gba_pokemon_emerald.reason: User-supplied ROM is present and the isolated setup script now installs PyGBA plus attempts a patched Windows mGBA CFFI rebuild, but the remaining MSVC mGBA build/link conflict requires deeper native remediation or a Linux/WSL emulator lane.

source_pygba.reason: PyGBA source and mGBA source are staged, and scripts\setup_emulator_runtime.ps1 -Lane gba performs best-effort PyGBA install plus Windows mGBA CFFI patching. If mGBA symbols/types still fail, treat it as a native runtime gate rather than benchmark plumbing.

source_mgba.reason: mGBA source is staged and the setup script attempts a patched Visual Studio CFFI rebuild. Current Windows builds still hit native mGBA/winsock/externpy conflicts before a usable _pylib is installed; prefer GB/GBC GymBoy pressure or a Linux/WSL mGBA lane until repaired.

source_stable_retro.reason: stable-retro source is staged, but local Windows wheel/build is unresolved. Prefer gymboy/PyBoy for GB/GBC pressure and PyGBA once mGBA CFFI is repaired.

source_procgen.reason: Procgen is useful pressure, but Windows support is native-runtime dependent; prefer already-smoked local RL lanes until a Linux/WSL/container runtime is selected.

source_airsim_drone_racing_lab.reason: Python client can be installed in isolation, but the simulator endpoint still requires explicit local simulator setup.

source_airsim.reason: AirSim is archived/heavy; keep metadata until a local simulator install is explicitly prepared.

source_px4_sitl.reason: Requires PX4 SITL binary/container and a running simulator endpoint; never starts flight-control endpoints implicitly.

source_aerial_gym_simulator.reason: Requires Isaac/Aerial Gym stack; keep metadata-only until the target GPU/runtime is selected.
